prompt: My attached model looks up intensely towards the camera, seated on the floor in a flowing, v-neck, silk, emerald green dress. Long flowing, slightly messy hair. Fingernails are painted an emerald green shade. The soft, natural lighting and shallow depth of field emphasize her facial features, creating an intimate, portrait-style photograph with a fine art aesthetic. Hair light. Rim lighting. Coy smile. Grounded realism, high-detail skin texture. Subtle make-up, soft pink lipstick. Backdrop is a blend of blacks and shades of gray.
